description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind Formatting that runs on push and pull request events to the development branch, specifically for files in amr-wind, unit_tests, and .github/workflows/format.yml. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code and runs clang-format-lint-action on the specified source files with extensions H, h, and cpp, excluding no files and using clangFormatVersion 11.
